since_last: 93% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.83%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 93% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.42% · Gold -0.75% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 93% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.83%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.83%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.24%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.24%, ORCL +3.75%, AMAT +3.75%, PLTR +3.71%, CEVA +3.38%. Laggards: DLR -1.23%, MU -0.53%, D -0.32%, AES -0.27%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.49% at $157.05
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
